word: H7300 - רוּד - rûwd - rood - Have the dominion

sections.paragraph:
Original: רוּד

Transliteration: rûd

Phonetic: rood

BDB Definition:

  1. to wander restlessly, roam
    1. (Qal) to roam
    2. (Hiphil) to be restless, show restlessness

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2129

Part(s) of speech: Verb
